title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Big Mom Pirates, Big Mom, Unknown person #7, Nami as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: The hell are you doing, zeus?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's no use. He's totally into it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're almost into the seducing woods!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we make it in the woods, this one's in the bag!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is the Lord of the Forest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A straight shot to the coast, eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nami, your plan was so cool

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If big mom isn't riding zes, we can actually shake her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. That cloud is made from Mama's soul...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Be careful! He's a tough one!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never eaten such rich, silky thunderclouds before!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, cloud! Forget about all that! Let me ride you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No can do. Only Mama, who gave me her soul, can ride me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AW! So you're just a cloud?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But will you become my servant in exchange?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
